Name: Columbia X Graco PowerFill 3.5 Loading Pump
Short description: Note: This product is not eligible for rebates, wholesale pricing, or discounts and is only available in North America.
Description:
Note: This product is not eligible for rebates, wholesale pricing, or discounts and is only available in North America.

Columbia Tools has partnered with Graco to bring you a Columbia Tools branded version of their already successful cordless powered loading pump for Columbia customers. The Columbia X Graco PowerFill is designed to fill all automatic taping and finishing tools with ease. The PowerFill system completely eliminates the need for manual pumping, allowing you to fill with just the push of a button.

Say Goodbye to Hand Pumping. The single-button pumping mechanism reduces fatigue and minimizes the risk of injury associated with manual pumps. With a flow rate of up to 3.5 gpm, you can fill tools lightning-fast, and with the capability to pump up to 55 gallons on a single battery charge, you’ll have all-day performance. Plus, it’s programmable to automatically refill tools with Precision Fill.

Bucket not included.

Features

  • SmartControl Pro with Programmable Precision Fill: Automatically refills your tools to your preset level.
  • One Button Pumping: Eliminates fatigue and potential injuries.
  • Hands-Free Continuous Run Mode: Ideal for transferring large quantities of material or self-cleaning.
  • Hi-Rise Fill Tube: Allows you to fill tools while standing upright, protecting your back and reducing fatigue. The tube rotates to position the outlet where needed, including above buckets to save space and contain drips.
  • Includes Filler Attachments: Designed for angle and flat boxes.

Powerstroke Pump

  • 4X Life vs. Manual Pumps: Built for exceptional durability.
  • Fastest Tool Fills: Pumps up to 3.5 gpm for efficient filling.
  • Maintenance Free: Tool-less access for easy cleaning of the pump cylinder, inlet, and filter.

ProConnect Pump and Removable Powerhead

  • No-Tools Pump and Powerhead Removal: Easily detach the powerhead for storage and quick cleaning.

Powered by DEWALT®

  • Compatible with any 20V MAX Lithium-Ion DEWALT Battery: Pumps up to 55 gallons per charge for reliable all-day use.

Adjustable Bucket Stabilizer

  • No-Tools Adjustment: Fits most buckets and containers.
  • Oversized Foot Bracket and Stabilizer Arm: Keeps the pump secure and stable.
  • Convertible Outlet: Change from right to left-sided pump outlet in minutes

Specifications

  • Version: 26B418
  • Max GPM (lpm): 3.5 (13.2)
  • Weight Lbs (Kg): 17 (7.7)
  • Pump: PowerStroke
  • Power/Battery: (1) DEWALT 20V MAX* COMPACT 2.0 ah Lithium-Ion Batteries and (1) Charger
  • Pump Outlet: Hi-Rise Fill Tube w/Box Filler
  • Precision Fill: Yes
  • Inlet Filter: Tool-less, 10 Mesh (1)
  • Adjustable Flow: Yes
  • Fits Container: Adjustable up to 5 (7-15″ Bucket Height Range)

Individual Part Numbers:

CPFP – Columbia PowerFill Pump (comes with box filler)

Description: TapeTech Applicator Heads apply a consistent base coat of joint compound for the cleanest and most efficient installation of paper-faced corner bead or joint tape. Applies joint compound to outside corner for paper-faced tape application (with 14TT, CA07TT or CA08TT).

Description: The TapeTech 76TT EasyClean® Loading Pump combines reliability with innovation. Description: TapeTech drywall joint compound rollers are ideal for applying large amounts of drywall compound on walls and ceilings for finishing large patches and butt joints, or skimming entire walls, ceilings and rooms. They are a great alternative to breaking out a sprayer or trying to apply the compound with knives or trowels. Simply apply the joint compound with the TapeTech premium drywall joint compound roller and then skim the area with a TapeTech premium finishing knife for an amazing finish. The 2" compound roller is perfect for applying joint compound to internal corners prior to using a corner flusher or finisher. This roller includes a specially designed extended roller frame; the roller is not replaceable. Key Features: Highest Quality: TapeTech premium drywall joint compound rollers are manufactured in Europe exclusively for TapeTech, using the highest quality reticulated polypropylene nap for great results and long life. Highest Capacity: TapeTech premium drywall joint compound rollers feature an 18mm nap - nearly 50% thicker than other brands with ½” nap – allowing you to apply nearly 50% more compound to the surface between fills compared to other high nap rollers. Highest Coverage: The unique design and manufacturing of TapeTech premium joint compound rollers releases more compound from the nap and onto the surface, providing the highest coverage rate per roller load. Robust Frame Design: TapeTech premium drywall joint compound rollers are designed for use with TapeTech roller frames. Our frames are a full 5/16” thick – stronger than smaller ¼” thick frames on the market. Comfortable Handle: The TapeTech Roller frames feature a comfortable, two-component over molded handle that provides comfortable handling and positive grip, even when wet. Ideal for Skimming: The TapeTech premium drywall joint compound rollers are ideal for quickly applying large amounts of compound over patches, butt joints or entire surfaces. Description: The Bazooka Continuous Flow Pump was designed in conjunction with Graco specifically to pump joint compound for high production drywall finishing applications. Short description: High-capacity TapeTech MAXXBOX® (7"–12") for efficient drywall finishing. Optimized capacity-to-weight ratio provides more mud for fill coats with less fatigue.
Description:
TapeTech MAXXBOX® Finishing Boxes are the industry's first high-capacity boxes designed with an optimized capacity-to-weight ratio. Available in 7", 10", and 12" widths, they provide significantly more usable compound for first and second coats—where volume is critical—without the excessive weight required for finish coats. The 7" MAXXBOX® delivers 94% more usable capacity than standard boxes. Featuring a pivoting axle to compensate for uneven surfaces and an adjustable crown dial for precise compound metering, the MAXXBOX® ensures a flawless, feathered finish on every joint.

  • Available Sizes: 7" (MAXX07TT), 10" (MAXX10TT), and 12" (MAXX12TT).

Name: TapeTech EasyClean® Nail Spotter
Short description: Professional TapeTech EasyClean® Nail Spotter available in 2" and 3" sizes. Features a hardened steel skid plate and EasyClean® lid for efficient, one-pass fastener finishing.
Description:
The TapeTech EasyClean® Nail Spotter is a professional-grade solution for efficiently finishing fastener indentations on walls and ceilings. Available in 2" and 3" widths, this tool is engineered to fill the depressions left by nail or screw heads and wipe away excess compound in a single, fluid pass. It features a high-quality stainless steel body and a hardened steel skid plate that identifies improperly set fasteners while protecting the blade from damage. The EasyClean® lid system allows for rapid disassembly and thorough maintenance, ensuring the tool remains in peak operating condition. Designed for versatility, it is fully compatible with TapeTech FHTT fiberglass and XHTT extension handles.

  • Dual-Pass Efficiency: Fills and finishes fastener heads simultaneously to accelerate project timelines.
  • Blade Protection: Hardened steel skid plate prevents damage from protruding fasteners and ensures smooth gliding.
  • EasyClean® Technology: Quick-release latch and gasket design for effortless cleanup and maintenance.
  • Available Sizes: 2" (NS02TT) and 3" (NS03TT) widths to match specific finishing requirements.
  • System Compatibility: Works seamlessly with standard TapeTech support handles via the NSA-TT adapter.

Name: TapeTech QuickBox® QSX
Short description: TapeTech QuickBox® QSX (6.5" or 8.5") designed for fast-setting joint compounds. Features a non-stick polypropylene shell for rapid hot mud application and cleanup.
Description:
The TapeTech QuickBox® QSX is the industry's first finishing box specifically engineered for use with fast-setting (hot) joint compounds. Constructed from advanced, glass-filled polypropylene, the shell provides a slick, ultra-durable surface that allows even dried hot mud to fall out with a few light taps. Available in 6.5" and 8.5" widths, the QuickBox® QSX features an optimized blade design that eliminates the need for complex crown adjustments. This tool allows contractors to combine the speed of a finishing box with the rapid turnaround of chemical-set compounds, making it ideal for first-coat applications over joint tape. It is compatible with all standard finishing box handles, including the TapeTech Wizard®.

  • Hot Mud Optimized: Advanced space-age materials prevent fast-setting compound from sticking to the tool.
  • Rapid Cleanup: Compound easily releases from the shell, significantly reducing maintenance time.
  • Fixed Blade Design: Optimized geometry matches the application, removing the need for crown settings.
  • Tool-Less Blade Change: Blades can be swapped in seconds to maintain a clean finish.
  • Available Sizes: 6.5" (QB06-QSX) and 8.5" (QB08-QSX) widths.

Name: TapeTech Bazooka Continuous Flow Taper
Short description: The Bazooka Continuous Flow Taper: Revolutionizing Drywall Finishing The Bazooka Continuous Flow Taper is an innovative tool designed to st
Description: The Bazooka Continuous Flow Taper: Revolutionizing Drywall Finishing   The Bazooka Continuous Flow Taper is an innovative tool designed to streamline the drywall finishing process. When connected to the Continuous Flow Pump (CTPMP), this advanced taper simultaneously applies drywall tape and the correct amount of joint compound to all types of drywall joints. This combination of efficiency and precision makes it an indispensable tool for professional contractors. Key Features of the Bazooka Continuous Flow Taper   One of the standout features of the Bazooka Continuous Flow Taper is its inline handle with dual trigger, which enhances control and ease of use. Weighing just 7 pounds, it is lightweight enough to be maneuvered effortlessly, reducing user fatigue during extended use. The taper's design includes a creaser wheel, which ensures a perfect finish every time by embedding the tape securely into the joint compound.   Additionally, the tool-less hose connection makes setup and disassembly quick and straightforward, saving valuable time on the job. For added convenience, the Bazooka Continuous Flow Taper can be paired with the CTVLV for wireless, radio frequency (RF) control, allowing the user to manage the flow of joint compound from the pump to the taper with ease.   Versatile Application   The Bazooka Continuous Flow Taper is versatile, capable of handling various types of drywall joints with precision: - Butt Joints and Flat Joints: Whether you're working on walls or ceilings, the taper applies the joint compound and tape seamlessly, ensuring a smooth and professional finish. - Internal Corners: The taper is designed to efficiently handle internal corners on walls and ceilings, making it a comprehensive solution for all your drywall finishing needs. Advantages of Using the Bazooka Continuous Flow Taper   - Increased Efficiency: By applying both tape and joint compound simultaneously, the Bazooka Continuous Flow Taper significantly speeds up the drywall finishing process. This increased efficiency allows for more work to be completed in less time, enhancing productivity. - Consistent Quality: The precise application of joint compound and tape ensures a consistent, high-quality finish on every joint. This consistency reduces the need for additional touch-ups and sanding, saving both time and materials. - Ease of Use: The lightweight design and ergonomic inline handle make the Bazooka Continuous Flow Taper easy to maneuver, even in tight spaces. The dual trigger system provides greater control over the application process, resulting in a more accurate and professional finish. - Quick Setup: The tool-less hose connection and wireless RF control simplify the setup and operation of the taper, allowing users to focus on the task at hand without worrying about complex equipment adjustments.   Conclusion   The Bazooka Continuous Flow Taper is an essential tool for anyone involved in drywall installation and finishing. Its advanced features, combined with its lightweight and ergonomic design, make it a valuable addition to any toolkit. Whether you are working on large-scale projects or smaller tasks, the Bazooka Continuous Flow Taper will help you achieve a flawless finish with minimal effort. Embrace the future of drywall finishing with the Bazooka Continuous Flow Taper and experience unparalleled efficiency and quality in your work.
Categories: Drywall Finishing Tools > TapeTech > Continuous Flow System
Tags: T05CF, continuous flow taper, cfs taper, bazooka

Description: TapeTech is the first company to introduce an interchangeable handle system that allows one support handle to be used with every tool. Whether you use standard, fixed length fiberglass handles or aluminum extension support handles, you’ll need just one base handle. The base handle for the fiberglass system is model FHTT. The base handle for the extension handle system is model XHTT. The base handle fits the corner roller, corner applicator and nail spotter without any adapters. The heavy duty, easy-to-change adapter (CFA-TT) connect the handles to the corner finishers. And the optimal diameter makes TapeTech handles the most ergonomic in the industry. Both base handles feature a D-shaped fitting that securely positions the handle in the Corner Applicator and positively prevents the tool from rotating during use. Note: If you use your current Nail Spotters with the handle system you will need to mount the handle in the back holes of the tabs on the Nail Spotter.

Description: TapeTech Corner Flushers make quick work of wiping or finishing inside corners. Direct flushers are used to apply joint compound to internal corners. Indirect flushers simply smooth compound that has been applied by another tool. TapeTech flushers work as both a direct and indirect flusher. That means you don’t have to decide which model to get, only which sizes fit your needs.
